tasks.label: Flash via Probe (SWD)
tasks.detail: Build + upload the firmware over the Raspberry Pi Debug Probe (CMSIS-DAP).

tasks.label: Kill OpenOCD
tasks.detail: Kills any leftover OpenOCD started by PlatformIO so the next debug session can grab the probe. Wired to postDebugTask in launch.json.

tasks.label: Flash via USB (UF2/BOOTSEL)
tasks.detail: Build + upload the firmware over USB to the normal env (preserves user data).
